title: erodium daucoides
intro: Erodium daucoides, also known as red stork's bill, is a perennial plant species belonging to the geranium family (Geraniaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The plant has various health benefits, including treating digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. Erodium daucoides is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
